about.visionText: Our vision is to create high-quality digital products.
about.howWeWorkDesc: We follow research, design, and implementation processes.
about.researchDesc: We conduct user and market research to understand needs.
about.designDesc: We design intuitive user interfaces and experiences.
about.implementationDesc: We build and deliver scalable solutions.
about.contactDesc: Interested in working together? Contact our team for a consultation.
about.longDesc: Because to us, the best digital products aren't just about looks — they're about how a solution helps businesses grow and connect with users.

portfolio.headline:
Work We
Take Pride In.
portfolio.waInquiry: Hi, I'm interested in working on a similar project like {title}. Can we discuss?

projects.challenge: KOHA Coffee needed a strong and memorable brand identity to stand out in the increasingly competitive local premium coffee market.
projects.solution: We created a sophisticated visual identity with a warm earth tone color palette reflecting the warmth and premium quality of their products. An elegant and timeless logo design became the foundation for the entire branding ecosystem.
projects.results: KOHA's brand recognition increased significantly among target market with strong visual consistency across all touchpoints.

projects.challenge: Navyra Studio needed a website that was not only visually beautiful but also showcased their capabilities as a design & development studio with impressive projects.
projects.solution: We developed a website combining modern design with smooth animations, responsive layout, and fast loading performance. A scalable architecture makes it easy to add projects and content.
projects.results: A professional and functional website that increased inquiry conversion rates and built credibility with potential clients.

projects.challenge: Olivia Beauty needed high-quality visual assets that could showcase their products in an elegant and aspirational way for their marketing campaigns.
projects.solution: We conducted professional product photography sessions with sophisticated lighting setups, styling consistent with brand aesthetics, and post-processing that enhanced visual impact without compromising product authenticity.
projects.results: High-quality photo assets increased social media engagement by 150% and significantly boosted online store conversion rates.

projects.challenge: VELLA Fashion wanted a comprehensive rebrand to increase their positioning as an aspirational and modern premium fashion label, competing with other local competitors.
projects.solution: We developed a comprehensive rebranding strategy with a luxury and sophisticated visual identity. Using a minimal color palette, premium typography, and an editorial approach that highlights craftsmanship and quality.
projects.results: A successful rebrand that elevated brand perception in the premium market segment, with 40% increase in customer acquisition from the new target market.

projects.challenge: Arkana Tech startup needed a strong online presence with a converting landing page and an intuitive internal dashboard to manage their data.
projects.solution: We developed a full-stack solution with modern tech stack, beautiful responsive design, and a powerful dashboard with real-time analytics. Focused on user experience and performance to maximize conversion.
projects.results: A successful platform with 500+ active users in the first 3 months and 8.5% conversion rate from landing page traffic.

projects.challenge: Lumira Interior Studio needed a mobile app to connect with clients, showcase their projects, and facilitate online consultations and project collaboration.
projects.solution: We designed an app with a user-friendly interface that makes it easy for clients to browse design samples, request consultations, and track project progress. Integration with calendar and messaging systems for seamless communication.
projects.results: A successful app that increased consultation requests by 250% and achieved 4.8/5 star client satisfaction score with 2000+ downloads.

hero.heading: Designing Digital Products that
hero.description: We help businesses deliver websites, systems, and visual identities that not only look modern but also create measurable impact for brand growth and user experience.
hero.logoAlt: Navyra Studio logo, back to home

cta.label: Start a Project
cta.heading: Got an idea?
cta.description: We're open for collaboration — from brand identity, web, to memorable digital product design.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our services and process.
faq.sideText: Don't hesitate to contact us directly. Our team is ready to help.

items.question: How long does it take to complete a project?
items.answer: Timeline depends on project complexity. Simple web development takes 4-6 weeks, UI/UX design 3-4 weeks, and branding 2-3 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline breakdown during consultation.

items.question: Is there a revision process after the project is complete?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely. Each service package includes unlimited revisions until you're satisfied with the results. Transparent communication is our priority.

items.question: How do I start collaborating with Navyra Studio?
items.answer: Simple! Contact us via WhatsApp, email, or the contact form on our website. We'll conduct a free consultation to understand your needs, then prepare a proposal and timeline together.

items.question: Do you accept remote projects?
items.answer: Of course. We work with clients from various locations online. Communication via Zoom, Slack, and email ensures effective collaboration.

items.question: What's included in the branding package?
items.answer: Our branding package includes: logo design, brand guidelines, color palette, typography, social media templates, and mockups. More details are available on our services page.

items.question: What about support after delivery?
items.answer: We provide post-delivery maintenance and support. Support details depend on the package you choose. You can consult further for your specific needs.

services.headline: Digital solutions designed to grow with your business.
services.description: Web Development, UI/UX Design, and Branding — all under one roof.

data.title: Web Development
data.description: Building modern, functional, and scalable websites and digital systems to help your business grow in the digital era.

items.name: Company Profile
items.description: Professional website to introduce your business. Responsive, SEO-friendly, and easy to manage.

medium.label: Starter
medium.description: 3-5 page website, professional appearance, responsive, without CMS.

menengah.label: Standard
menengah.description: 5-10 page website, simple CMS, basic SEO, and light animations.

high.label: Professional
high.description: Multilingual website, API integration, high performance, and full support.
